user.title: Sdui Setup
user.description: Enter your Sdui Bearer token. You can find it in your browser's developer tools (Network tab) when logged into sdui.app.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired token. Please provide a fresh Bearer token.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Sdui API. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Sdui account is already configured.
